emails.subject: Re: ISDA with ALCOA
emails.body: Re: ISDA with ALCOA Below is the ISDA in electronic format as you requested. This draft is several years old and if you are putting a new one in place I would suggest you start from the newest version of the form and just use this to use as a blackline version. Ian Brungs@ENRON 05/14/2001 01:31 PM

emails.subject: ISDA with ALCOA
emails.body: ISDA with ALCOA Hello Tana, I have spoken with the lawyer from Alcoa and she is fine with us viewing the ISDA in place. In fact we already have a copy but I need it in Electronic format. If you could send an electronic copy it woud be greatly appreciated. Thanks Ian
